generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor on the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing joint angle on the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorJointAngleDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder on the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxJointAngleDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – Data streams
instance CurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorJointAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxJointAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – Simulation streams
instance SimulatedMotorOutputDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

// C10: Models/Data – Engineering and simulation models
instance EngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML block diagram of motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb–Viscous friction model executable in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model executable in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model executable in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model executable in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Calculation of torque from current and encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance VelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Calculation of angular velocity from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C10: Models/Data – Measured and simulated data
instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MotorJointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor joint angle from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxJointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox joint angle from secondary gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueReferenceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque reference data from sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream, MotorJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance AngularVelocityReferenceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity reference data from sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output (e.g., output angle) from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system output of joint"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxJointAngleDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTMessaging, MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output from Coulomb–Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorOutputDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output from Coulomb–Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedSystemOutputDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Tool used to analyze structural and behavioural models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralAnalysisService, BehaviouralAnalysisService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink used to run simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTMessaging : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging system for streaming sensor data to the DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataAggregationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for storing asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService, TraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization system for displaying data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataTraceTraceabilityService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard for the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataDashboardInsight
]

instance ContinuousIdentificationJointFrictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of ideal versus frictional behaviour"
    DTDFVocab:provides IdealVsFrictionalComparisonInsight
]

instance ComparisonMeasuredVsSimulatedService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured versus simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:provides MeasuredVsSimulatedComparisonInsight
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data aggregation and traceability within the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data trace traceability for audit and compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Providing asset metadata from the AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance StructuralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of the structural SysML model of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralAnalysisInsight
]

instance BehaviouralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of the behavioural models of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviouralAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataTraceTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability insight via the dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceTraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identification of friction model parameters from data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance LiveDataDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of sensor and simulation data for the first axis"
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters based on DT analysis"
]

instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically update controller friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IdealVsFrictionalComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between ideal and frictional behaviour in simulation"
]

instance MeasuredVsSimulatedComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured data versus simulated data"
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated data insight for trend analysis"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data traces for audit"
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset metadata retrieved from AAS"
]

instance StructuralAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from structural model analysis"
]

instance BehaviouralAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from behavioural model analysis"
]

instance DataTraceTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability insight from dashboard visualization"
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction model parameters"
]

// C10: Component and Environment
instance MABIMax100RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial industrial robot MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis focusing on joint friction"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMax100RobotFirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time monitoring at the robot’s sensor rate (i.e., updates per control cycle, typically 1‑kHz), with data processed immediately for live friction estimation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated set of components: asset definition (MABI robot), processing component (simulation engine), engineering model, data traces, and dashboard; all communicating via MQTT and AAS."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operating stage; the digital shadow represents the robot in action, providing continuous real‑time data against ideal behavioural models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models are validated by comparing simulated frictionless and frictional outputs against measured data; continuous identification provides adaptive updating, ensuring traceability and reducing uncertainties."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used to transmit sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow; data traces are linked via structural models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system modelling and OPC UA Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset metadata; references to digital shadow concept from Kritzinger et al."
]
